channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg says Apple hasn’t innovated since the iPhone. He’s forgetting about this one major thing
item.description: Last week, as part of his apparent ongoing campaign to rebrand himself as a more Musk-like figure, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg sat down with Joe Rogan for a three-hour discussion about free speech, government “censorship,” and how important it is that American companies win the AI race.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Trump launches first official cryptocurrency
item.description: President-elect Trump launched his first official cryptocurrency, which shot up in value quickly to kick off his inauguration weekend. “My NEW Official Trump Meme is HERE! It’s time to celebrate everything we stand for: WINNING! Join my very special Trump Community.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Health care AI, intended to save money, turns out to require a lot of expensive humans
item.description: Artificial intelligence systems require consistent monitoring and staffing to put in place and to keep them working well.
item.dc:creator: Tribune News Service, The Mercury News

item.title: These powerful in-wheel motors could spawn the next generation of affordable high-performance EVs
item.description: Donut Lab recently showcased the next generation of its in-wheel motor technology that has the potential to change the EV game.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: For TikTok users, mourning, frustration and clinging to hope as TikTok ban looms
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The U.S. is inching closer and closer to a potential TikTok ban — with the nation's highest court upholding a law that's set to halt new downloads of the app starting Sunday.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS and MAE ANDERSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The Supreme Court’s decision on TikTok may have just turned a generation off politics
item.description: Opinions can be shaped very quickly, and grudges last a long time. Donald Trump knows that better than most. Joe Biden ought to, but seemingly doesn’t.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok refugees are pouring to Xiaohongshu. Here's what you need to know about the RedNote app
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As the fate of TikTok hangs in the balance, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu, also called RedNote – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: FU TING and DAVID COHEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Carnahan accomplished much of what she came to GSA to do
item.description: Robin Carnahan, the out-going GSA administrator, said the federal footprint shrunk by 11 million square feet and saved $2 billion in 2024 alone. The post Carnahan accomplished much of what she came to GSA to do first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Who could buy TikTok? Only a few parties are serious about offering
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The supremely popular TikTok could be banned on Jan. 19 under a federal law that forces the video sharing platform to divest itself from its China-based parent company, ByteDance, or shut down its U.S. operations.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Apple M4 Mac mini Users Report Issues with USB-C Connections - A Growing Concern
item.description: Users of the latest Apple Mac mini (M4) are experiencing issues with their USB-C connections, including random disconnections and Bluetooth problems. The cause is unclear, but it's affecting many users.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Bitcoin soars past $100,000 ahead of possible early action on crypto by Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The price of bitcoin topped $100,000 again early Friday as a pumped up cryptocurrency industry expects early action by Donald Trump when he's sworn in as president next week.
item.dc:creator: ALAN SUDERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The end of the Nvidia RTX 4000 series is nigh – with the RTX 4070 expected to sell out in weeks
item.description: Nvidia's RTX 5000 series GPUs are finally here, which could spell bad news for anyone hoping to buy a new RTX 4070 GPU.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Lenovo to acquire Infinidat to expand its storage folio
item.description: Lenovo Group has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Tel Aviv-based enterprise storage provider Infinidat, for an undisclosed sum, to expand its storage offerings. The startup provides several offerings, such as InfiniBox, Infinibox SSA, InfiniGuard, and InfuzeOS.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Chinese AI Company Revolutionizes Robotics with Open-Source Dataset
item.description: AgiBot's transformative dataset, AgiBot World Alpha, is set to reshape our understanding of robotic learning and adaptation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nvidia presenta nuevos microservicios de protección para la IA agéntica
item.description: Nvidia ha incorporado a sus herramientas de software Nvidia NeMo Guardrails nuevos microservicios de inferencia (NIM) para robustecer la seguridad de la inteligencia artificial (IA).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Drone collides with paraglider, forcing emergency landing
item.description: The incident happened the same day that a firefighting aircraft had to be grounded while battling the Palisades Fire.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, NewsNation

item.title: Singular Bank ficha a Rubén Andrés como director general de Tecnología y Operaciones
item.description: A menudo, a comienzos de año se producen cambios en las cúpulas directivas de las organizaciones, independientemente del sector de actividad, como seña del nuevo camino que se abre durante los próximos 365 días.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Redefining enterprise transformation in the age of intelligent ecosystems
item.description: As IT professionals and business decision-makers, we’ve routinely used the term “digital transformation” for well over a decade now to describe a portfolio of enterprise initiatives that somehow magically enable strategic business capabilities.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Soft robotic armband gives prosthetic hand users natural control
item.description: Researchers found in a study that users of a robotic prosthetic hand could successfully grasp and move two objects at once without dropping them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC posts 57% surge in profit thanks to the AI boom
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Taiwan computer chip maker TSMC reported Thursday that its profit in the last quarter rose 57%, buoyed by the artificial intelligence boom. The world’s biggest semiconductor manufacturer reported a net profit of 374.7 billion new Taiwan dollars ($11.4 billion), higher than expected.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
